title: jasminum gilgianum
intro: Jasminum gilgianum, also known as the Chinese jasmine vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Jasminum gilgianum include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
